title: gymnadenia zeyheri
intro: Gymnadenia zeyheri, also known as the autumn gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gymnadenia zeyheri include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Gymnadenia zeyheri can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by combining the plant's aerial parts with other herbs or using it as a single-plant extract.
